children.text: Conversation 1: Packing Up
Jim's Request
Dad, can I hang out with my friends after lunch?
children.speaker: Jim
children.cn: 爸爸，午饭后我可以和朋友们出去玩吗？
children.notes: hang out with: 和某人出去玩/消磨时间
children.statement: 这句话是在询问许可。
children.explanation: Can I... 是用来征求许可的常用句型。

children.text: Sorry, Jim, you have to pack up your things first.
children.speaker: Dad
children.cn: 抱歉，吉姆，你得先收拾好你的东西。
children.statement: have to 表示主观意愿。
children.explanation: have to 通常表示客观的必要性或义务。

children.text: But I want to spend time with them before we move.
children.speaker: Jim
children.cn: 但我搬家前想和他们待在一起。
children.notes: spend time with: 和某人共度时光
children.statement: spend time with 意思是浪费时间。
children.explanation: spend time with 的意思是和某人共度时光。

children.text: Dad's Instructions
I know, but we need to get ready before the movers come.
children.speaker: Dad
children.cn: 我知道，但在搬家工人来之前我们需要做好准备。
children.statement: movers 指的是搬家工人。
children.explanation: mover 是 move (搬家) 的派生词，指搬家公司的人员。

children.text: Can you sort your things into those boxes?
children.speaker: Dad
children.cn: 你能把你的东西分类放进那些盒子里吗？
children.statement: sort 在这里是整理分类的意思。
children.explanation: sort 作为动词，意为分类、整理。

children.text: OK. After that, could I go out?
children.speaker: Jim
children.cn: 好的。那之后，我可以出去吗？
children.notes: could I: 比 can I 更礼貌的请求方式
children.statement: could 比 can 语气更委婉。
children.explanation: 在请求许可时，使用 could 会显得更加礼貌。

children.text: Yes. Remember to write "Jim's bedroom" on each box!
children.speaker: Dad
children.cn: 可以。记得在每个盒子上写上“吉姆的卧室”！
children.notes: Remember to do: 记得去做某事
children.statement: Remember to write 意思是记得写。
children.explanation: Remember to do sth. 表示记得去做某事（还没做）。

children.text: No problem, Dad.
children.speaker: Jim
children.cn: 没问题，爸爸。
children.statement: No problem 常用于回应请求。
children.explanation: No problem 是口语中表示同意或没问题的常用语。

children.text: Conversation 2: New House
Jim & Dad: Keeping Fish & Photos
I love our new house.
children.speaker: Jim
children.cn: 我喜欢我们的新房子。

children.text: The living room is so big!
children.speaker: Jim
children.cn: 客厅太大了！

children.text: Could we keep some fish here?
children.speaker: Jim
children.cn: 我们可以在这儿养些鱼吗？
children.statement: keep 在这里是保持的意思。
children.explanation: keep 在这里是“饲养”的意思。

children.text: Well, Jim, that's a lot of work.
children.speaker: Dad
children.cn: 嗯，吉姆，那可是很多工作。

children.text: Can you take care of them every day?
children.speaker: Dad
children.cn: 你能每天照顾它们吗？
children.statement: take care of 意思是照顾。
children.explanation: take care of 是固定短语，意为照顾。

children.text: Yes!
children.speaker: Jim
children.cn: 是的！

children.text: OK. Now, could you please help me hang up the photos?
children.speaker: Dad
children.cn: 好的。现在，你能帮我把照片挂起来吗？

children.text: Sure.
children.speaker: Jim
children.cn: 当然。

children.text: Helen & Peter: Flowers & Inviting Friends
Our balcony is so big and gets a lot of sunshine.
children.speaker: Helen
children.cn: 我们的阳台很大，而且阳光充足。

children.text: Can I grow some flowers there?
children.speaker: Helen
children.cn: 我可以在那儿种些花吗？

children.text: Yes, you can. That's a great idea, Helen!
children.speaker: Mum
children.cn: 是的，你可以。那是个好主意，海伦！

children.text: Mum, can I invite my friends to our new house?
children.speaker: Peter
children.cn: 妈妈，我可以邀请我的朋友来我们的新房子吗？

children.text: Yes, Peter, but help clean up first.
children.speaker: Mum
children.cn: 可以，彼得，但先帮忙打扫一下。

children.text: Could you please sweep the floor? I'll clean the bathroom.
children.speaker: Mum
children.cn: 你能扫一下地吗？我去打扫浴室。

children.text: OK, Mum.
children.speaker: Peter
children.cn: 好的，妈妈。

children.text: The Announcement
Guess what! Grandpa and Grandma are visiting us this weekend!
children.cn: 你们猜怎么着！爷爷和奶奶这周末要来看我们！
children.statement: 爷爷奶奶打算下个月来拜访。
children.explanation: 对话中明确说是 'this weekend'（这周末），而不是下个月。因此陈述是错误的。

children.text: Oh, great!
children.cn: 噢，太棒了！
children.statement: 听到这个消息，吉姆感到非常高兴。
children.explanation: 吉姆说 'Oh, great!'，表示听到这个消息非常高兴。陈述正确。
children.speaker: Jim

children.text: I can't wait to show them our new house!
children.cn: 我等不及要向他们展示我们的新房子了！
children.statement: 'can't wait to do sth' 的意思是“等不及要做某事”。
children.explanation: 'can't wait to do sth' 是常用短语，表示迫不及待、等不及做某事。陈述正确。
children.speaker: Peter
Dad

children.text: Grandma Clean
Yes, but now we need to get ready for their arrival. Can you help me clean up their room?
children.cn: 是的，但现在我们需要为他们的到来做好准备。你能帮我打扫一下他们的房间吗？
children.statement: 妈妈在请求帮助准备房间迎接爷爷奶奶。
children.explanation: 妈妈询问 'Can you help me clean up their room?' 寻求帮忙打扫。陈述正确。

children.text: But their room is already clean!
children.cn: 但是他们的房间已经很干净了！
children.statement: 彼得认为不需要打扫，因为房间已经很干净了。
children.explanation: 彼得提出房间已经是干净的（'already clean'），不解为何需要再次打扫。陈述正确。

children.text: Well, it's not "grandma clean" yet!
children.cn: 好吧，这还没达到“奶奶级别的干净”呢！
children.statement: 'yet' 常用于否定句或疑问句末尾，表示“还（未）”。
children.explanation: 在否定句 'not... yet' 中，yet 意为“还”，强调目前尚未达到某个标准。陈述正确。

children.text: Oh, OK.
children.cn: 噢，好吧。
children.statement: 彼得拒绝了妈妈的打扫请求。
children.explanation: 彼得最后说 'Oh, OK' 表示顺从和答应打扫。因此陈述是错误的。
children.speaker: Peter
Mum
Peter
Mum

children.text: Room Setup
Jim, can you help me put the new clock on the wall? I bought it for Grandpa to see the time.
children.cn: 吉姆，你能帮我把新钟表挂在墙上吗？我买它是为了让爷爷看时间。
children.statement: 爸爸买钟表是为了给奶奶看时间。
children.explanation: 爸爸说 'bought it for Grandpa'，是为了给爷爷（Grandpa）看时间，而不是给奶奶。因此陈述是错误的。

children.text: Sure, Dad.
children.cn: 没问题，爸爸。
children.statement: 吉姆欣然同意了爸爸的请求。
children.explanation: 吉姆说 'Sure, Dad' 表示乐意并同意帮忙。陈述正确。
children.speaker: Jim
Dad

children.text: Helen, can you move this chair to their room? Grandpa likes reading books in front of the window.
children.cn: 海伦，你能把这把椅子搬到他们的房间吗？爷爷喜欢在窗前看书。
children.statement: 爷爷喜欢在门后看书。
children.explanation: 对话中明确指出 'in front of the window'，是窗前，而不是门后。因此陈述是错误的。

children.text: No problem, Dad. Can I put some flowers by the window?
children.cn: 没问题，爸爸。我能在窗边放些花吗？
children.statement: 'by the window' 的意思是“在窗户旁边”。
children.explanation: 介词 'by' 在此处意为“在……旁边”，'by the window' 表示在窗户旁。陈述正确。
children.speaker: Helen
Dad

children.text: Flower Shopping
Yes, good idea! Grandma loves flowers.
children.cn: 好主意！奶奶喜欢花。
children.statement: 爸爸支持海伦在窗边放花的想法，因为奶奶喜欢花。
children.explanation: 爸爸说 'Yes, good idea! Grandma loves flowers'，说明奶奶爱花，海伦的提议很好。陈述正确。

children.text: Mum, could you take me to the flower shop later?
children.cn: 妈妈，你过会儿能带我去花店吗？
children.statement: 海伦希望妈妈立刻带她去花店。
children.explanation: 海伦用的是 'later'（待会儿/过会儿），而不是立刻。因此陈述是错误的。

children.text: No problem. Let's go after lunch.
children.cn: 没问题。我们午饭后去吧。
children.statement: 妈妈决定在午饭前带海伦去花店。
children.explanation: 妈妈说 'Let's go after lunch'（我们午饭后去吧），而不是午饭前。因此陈述是错误的。
children.speaker: Mum
Helen
Dad

tree.text: Going Home for the Spring Festival

children.text: The Journey
"It's almost the Spring Festival. Can we go to Hainan for the holiday, Dad?"
children.cn: “快过春节了。爸爸，我们能去海南度假吗？”
children.statement: 孩子询问爸爸是否能在春节去海南度假。
children.explanation: 句子中表达了询问去海南度假的想法。陈述正确。

children.text: "Not this time," Dad answered with a smile. "We're going to your mum's hometown!"
children.cn: “这次不行，”爸爸微笑着回答。“我们要去你妈妈的故乡！”
children.statement: 他们决定去海南度假。
children.explanation: 爸爸说 'Not this time'（这次不行），他们要去的是妈妈的故乡（mum's hometown），不是海南。因此陈述是错误的。

children.text: Soon the day of our family trip came. We got up very early in the morning to catch the train.
children.cn: 很快，我们家庭旅行的日子到了。我们早上起得很早去赶火车。
children.statement: 'get up' 过去式为 'got up'，'to catch the train' 不定式作目的状语。
children.explanation: 动词 get 的过去式是 got；to catch the train 是动词不定式，在句中作目的状语，表示“为了赶火车”。陈述正确。

children.text: The train journey took more than five hours, and then we changed to a bus to get to my grandparents' village in the afternoon.
children.cn: 火车旅程花了五个多小时，然后我们在下午转乘公共汽车前往我祖父母的村庄。
children.statement: 坐火车旅行花了不到五个小时。
children.explanation: 文中提到 'took more than five hours'（花了五个多小时），而不是不到五个小时。因此陈述是错误的。

children.text: The Arrival
At the end of the road, I saw Grandpa and my little cousin standing in the cold wind waiting for us.
children.cn: 在路的尽头，我看到爷爷和小表弟站在寒风中等我们。
children.statement: 爷爷和表弟在暖和的屋里等着他们。
children.explanation: 他们站在寒风（cold wind）中等待，因此是在户外。陈述是错误的。

children.text: We walked quickly to greet them. Grandpa helped us pull the heavy luggage into the house.
children.cn: 我们快步走过去迎接他们。爷爷帮我们把沉重的行李拉进屋里。
children.statement: 爷爷帮助他们搬了行李。
children.explanation: 爷爷帮助他们把沉重的行李拉进了屋里（'helped us pull the heavy luggage'）。陈述正确。

children.text: "Ah, home again!" said Mum with a smile on her face.
children.cn: “啊，又到家了！”妈妈脸上带着微笑说道。
children.statement: 回到故乡，妈妈感到很伤心。
children.explanation: 妈妈是带着微笑（'with a smile'）说 'home again!'，感到温暖亲切，并非伤心。因此陈述是错误的。

children.text: Dinner Time
Grandma, my aunt, and my uncle were busy cooking dinner in the kitchen. They were very happy to see us.
children.cn: 奶奶、婶婶和叔叔正忙着在厨房做饭。他们看到我们非常高兴。
children.statement: 'be busy doing sth' 意为“忙于做某事”。
children.explanation: 固定搭配 'be busy doing sth' 表示忙着做某事，这里是 'were busy cooking'。陈述正确。

children.text: "Could you bring Wenwen her favourite snacks?" Grandma asked Grandpa.
children.cn: “你能给雯雯拿她最喜欢的零食吗？”奶奶问爷爷。
children.statement: 奶奶请求爷爷给雯雯拿零食。
children.explanation: 奶奶问爷爷 'Could you bring Wenwen her favourite snacks?'，属于委婉请求。陈述正确。

children.text: I shared the snacks with my cousin and told Grandpa about school. He was happy to hear I was doing well at school.
children.cn: 我和表弟分享了零食，并跟爷爷讲了学校里的事。听到我在学校表现很好，他很高兴。
children.statement: 作者独自吃完了所有零食，没有分享。
children.explanation: 文中写到 'I shared the snacks with my cousin'（我和我的表弟分享了零食）。因此陈述是错误的。

children.text: We then enjoyed all the delicious food. "Mm, the familiar taste of home!" said Mum.
children.cn: 然后我们享用了所有美味的食物。“嗯，这熟悉的家的味道！”妈妈说。
children.statement: 'delicious' 意为“美味的”，'familiar' 意为“熟悉的”。
children.explanation: 这两个词的中文意思分别是：delicious美味的，familiar熟悉的。陈述正确。

children.text: During the dinner, my uncle told us some jokes and we had a good laugh.
children.cn: 晚餐期间，我叔叔给我们讲了一些笑话，我们开怀大笑。
children.statement: 晚餐时气氛非常沉闷严肃。
children.explanation: 叔叔讲了笑话，大家开怀大笑（'had a good laugh'），说明气氛很欢乐愉快，不沉闷。因此陈述是错误的。

children.text: The Departure
Several days later when we were leaving, Grandma held my hands and asked us, "Will you come home more often?"
children.cn: 几天后我们要走的时候，奶奶握着我的手问我们：“你们能常回家看看吗？”
children.statement: 奶奶舍不得他们走，希望他们多回家。
children.explanation: 奶奶拉着手问 'Will you come home more often?'，体现了对晚辈依依不舍与期盼。陈述正确。

children.text: Mum nodded, with tears in her eyes.
children.cn: 妈妈点点头，眼里含着泪水。
children.statement: 妈妈在摇头表示拒绝。
children.explanation: 妈妈是 'nodded'（点头），而不是摇头。因此陈述是错误的。
